'''Tarl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] individual who is the son of [[Yander (Ord Cestus)|Yander]], a native miner of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], who once was the husband of [[Sheeka Tull]]. He had a sister, [[Tonoté]], and a brother, [[Mithail]]. Tarl had a burly build.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
